segments.text: NCRT is hiring for roles most people don't even associate with government jobs. Production officers, script
writers, public relations officers. It has released a major non-academic recruitment notification. These are non-eing, non-faculty government roles,
roles across administration, technical and communication teams along with clerical and support roles. There are
173 vacancies across group A, B and C posts. Eligibility ranges from 10th pass to post-graduate depending on the role.
So whether you finished school or have a degree, there may be a position you qualify for. These are central government jobs under the 7th pay commission which means structured pay,
job stability, and long-term progression. Applications are open right now. The window closes mid January.
Apply only through the official NCRT website. Selection depends on the post,
written tests, skill tests for technical or media roles and interviews with document verification. Official notification link is in the pinned comment.
